title: White Plastic Mesh Strainer, Ultra-Fine Nylon Mesh Sieve with Handle (100/200/400 Mesh), Food Grade PP Strainer for SOYA Milk/Juice/Coffee/Tea and Other Liquid (400 Mesh)
features: Food Grade Material: The ultra-fine nylon mesh sieve is made of food-grade high-quality nylon material, can be in direct contact with food, safe and secure, not easy to damage.
Size: The nylon mesh sieve measures 24*14.5cm. There are 3 specifications for the food filter, 100/200/400 fine mesh, which allows you to choose different filters according to different foods.
Hanging Hole design: This hanging hole design is very convenient for you to hang and store it. When it is hanging, it not only saves space but also allows the strainer to drain faster.

Easy to Clean: The filter is very easy to clean. You can choose to wash it by hand or in a dishwasher. After washing, you can dry it and wait for the next use. It should be noted that it should be washed with warm soapy water before using it for the first time.

Various Usage: The white plastic mesh strainer is perfect for filtering juices, jams, soya milk, tea, coffee and many other liquids to give them a more delicate taste. It is a good choice for you to use them to make delicious drinks.
description: Product Description: Name:Filter sieve with handle Material:Nylon Size:23x14cm Colour:White Notes: 1.Due to the difference of light and screen settings, the colour of the item may be slightly different from the picture. 2.Due to the difference of manual measurement, the size may be slightly different, please understand
